perksWithImages.name: Bloodhound
perksWithImages.description: Pools of Blood are brighter and last {Tunable.K02P02.ExtraTrackDuration}s longer.

perksWithImages.name: Dead Man’s Switch
perksWithImages.description: When you hook a Survivor, the first time a Survivor stops repairing a Generator, it is blocked for {Tunable.K19P02.GeneratorBlockDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.K19P02.GeneratorBlockDuration}s.

perksWithImages.name: Mirrored Illusion
perksWithImages.description: After repairing {Tunable.S42P01.RequiredProgress%}% of Generators, while next to a Chest, Exit Gate Switch, Generator, or Totem, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} to create a static illusion for {Tunable.S42P01.HuskDuration}s.

perksWithImages.name: Wake Up!
perksWithImages.description:
When all Generators are completed:
  • You see the Auras of Exit Gate Switches.
  • While opening an Exit Gate, other Survivors see your Aura.
  • For each Survivor alive, you open Exit Gates {Tunable.S11P01.GateOpenSpeed%}% faster.
